title: Klaviyo vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Omnisend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, ratings, and which tool suits your e-commerce needs.
h1: Klaviyo vs Omnisend: Detailed Comparison for E-Commerce
intro: Both Klaviyo and Omnisend are powerful email and SMS marketing platforms built specifically for e-commerce brands. This comparison helps you understand the key differences in pricing, features, and performance to choose the right platform for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Predictive analytics, deep Shopify/WooCommerce integration, reviews management
comparison_table.tool_b: Omnichannel approach, push notifications, pre-built workflows, more affordable

choose_a_if: You prioritize advanced predictive analytics and AI-driven insights for customer behavior
You're running Shopify or WooCommerce and need deep native integrations
You want to manage customer reviews alongside marketing automation
choose_b_if: You have a tight budget and need an affordable entry point starting at $16/month
You want push notifications alongside email and SMS for true omnichannel marketing
You prefer pre-built workflows and a simpler setup for beginners

faq.a: Klaviyo offers more advanced features like predictive analytics and deeper e-commerce integrations, making it better for mature brands needing sophisticated automation. Omnisend excels at providing a more affordable, user-friendly omnichannel experience with push notifications included. The best choice depends on your budget and feature requirements.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is significantly cheaper, starting at $16/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Omnisend also offers a more generous free tier with 250 contacts versus Klaviyo's 500, though at a lower subscriber limit. For budget-conscious businesses, Omnisend provides better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and historical data. However, automation workflows will need to be manually recreated in Klaviyo, as migration tools are limited. Plan the transition during a low-volume period to minimize disruption to your campaigns.
